mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling or flat at a low level, discount rates and policy-tightening fears ease, lifting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 20-day returns do not occur more often than negative returns after FEDFUNDS declines, or if rolling 2-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE above its recent trend signals labor-market deterioration, lower household income expectations, and weaker earnings revisions, which should precede negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes produce positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the sign of the effect flips positive over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized acceleration in RSAFS and PAYEMS indicates broadening domestic demand and improving corporate revenue growth, which should support positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint signal is not stronger than either proxy alone, or if Rank IC for the interaction term remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An acceleration in INDPRO after a prior soft patch signals improving industrial output and cyclical earnings leverage, which should lead to positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises above its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if positive 60-day returns do not dominate after the trigger, or if the effect is absent in two consecutive 3-year subperiods.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in HOUST above trend signals stronger housing turnover, construction demand, and wealth effects, which should improve cyclical earnings expectations and lift S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if above-trend HOUST is not associated with higher 20-day forward returns than below-trend periods, or if rolling 2-year Rank IC stays below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains low, real policy rates turn more accommodative in forward-looking terms and risk assets reprice higher over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS interaction does not outperform either series alone, or if the 5-day signal is negative in more than half of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A low and stable UNRATE combined with rising PAYEMS identifies labor-market resilience, supporting consumption and earnings expectations, which should generate positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE < 5.0% and PAYEMS rising for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered cases fail to show a positive median 60-day return, or if the combined signal has no incremental value versus PAYEMS alone.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 growth is slowing while RSAFS remains firm, markets infer that nominal demand is holding up but real activity is weakening, which should pressure equity returns over the next 20 days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 decelerates while RSAFS stays above its 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if the slowdown-spread signal does not predict negative 20-day returns, or if positive returns dominate in triggered instances over any 2-year rolling window.
